channel.title: Jenn Tesolin Notes
channel.description: Notes and write-ups from Jenn Tesolin

item.title: Using iOS and Android devices together
item.description: Tips for using Android and Apple devices together, including calendar, contacts, iCloud mail, and music.

item.title: A guide to setting up a Chromebook for web development
item.description: Outdated: Notes on using a budget Chromebook for web development, including Linux, IDEs, browsers, and other tools.

item.title: Jekyll: Static Sites on the DigitalOcean App Platform
item.description: Update in progress: This tutorial describes how to host your Jekyll static site, including plugins, on the DigitalOcean App Platform.

item.title: Installing Homebrew and Fixing Ruby on macOS
item.description: Update in progress: Notes on installing Homebrew, managing packages, and updating Ruby on macOS.

item.title: Great apps and programs for web development
item.description: Update in progress: A list of applications you can use for web development, grouped into free, paid, and subscription-based tools.

item.title: Installing Git and GitHub on your Mac
item.description: Update in progress: This post describes older ways to install Git and GitHub tools on macOS.

item.title: Jekyll: Setting up your development environment
item.description: Update in progress: Jekyll is a static site generator built with Ruby. This post covers an older setup for getting a local Jekyll development environment running.

item.title: Installing Node.js and Grunt on macOS
item.description: Outdated: Notes on installing Node.js and Grunt on macOS, preserved for reference.

item.title: Quick Tip: Highcharts credit in a new window
item.description: A quick example of opening a Highcharts credit link in a new window or tab.

item.title: Quick Tip: WordPress and Campaign Monitor
item.description: A quick and simple way to integrate your Campaign Monitor list with WordPress.

item.title: 6 resources you may find at your local library
item.description: A look at resources available through the Toronto Public Library, along with a reminder to check what your own local library offers.

item.title: PHP Tip: Comparing integers and numeric strings
item.description: This post describes how to compare variables containing integers using PHP.

item.title: Change your iTunes media view mode
item.description: A quick tip on changing playlist view mode in a newer iTunes release.

item.title: Jekyll: Configure Jekyll for GitHub Pages
item.description: Update in progress: Notes on configuring a Jekyll site for GitHub Pages, with older hosting details kept only where still useful.

item.title: Jekyll: Fix pagination after upgrading to version 3
item.description: In Jekyll 3, built-in pagination was deprecated. This post describes how to resolve the error.

item.title: Jekyll: The configuration file
item.description: Update in progress: The Jekyll configuration file `_config.yml` holds important settings for your site. This post highlights some items used in one of my older sites.

item.title: Jekyll: Custom Search
item.description: This post describes how to create a basic search using JSON and jQuery.

item.title: Creating a Development Environment for IIS 7+
item.description: Outdated: This post describes how to enable IIS on Windows 7, along with setting up MySQL and PHP. Administrator access is required.

item.title: WordPress Blog Migration
item.description: This post describes a few ways to move WordPress, either to a different server or to Jekyll.

item.title: Using RasPlex for your Media Server
item.description: Update in progress: An older post about setting up a Raspberry Pi media centre with RasPlex.

item.title: Creating the Sticky Footer with Fixed Navbar example using Bootstrap 3 and Emmet
item.description: Outdated: This post describes how to use Emmet shortcuts to quickly create Bootstrap’s Sticky Footer with Fixed Navbar example.

item.title: Raspberry Pi: Setting Up Bluetooth
item.description: Outdated: Notes on setting up a Bluetooth dongle with Raspbmc on a Raspberry Pi.

item.title: WordPress Development Tips: Updates and Deprecated Notices
item.description: Outdated: A few WordPress development tips for update prompts and deprecated plugin notices.

item.title: Fixing Ubuntu 12.04 network issue
item.description: Outdated: Notes on fixing a network issue after upgrading an Ubuntu virtual machine from 10 LTS to 12.04 LTS.

item.title: ASP.NET Menu Control: Styling with Bootstrap 2
item.description: Outdated: Notes on adapting an ASP.NET menu control to work with Bootstrap 2 instead of using hard-coded navigation.

item.title: Quick Tip: Using Font Awesome 4 with Bootstrap 3
item.description: A quick post on how to use Font Awesome 4 with Bootstrap 3.

item.title: Using RequireJS with Bootstrap, Google Maps, and more
item.description: Outdated: This post describes how to move an older Google Maps and Bootstrap setup into a config file for use with RequireJS.

item.title: Bootstrap 3 and Google Maps
item.description: Outdated: Notes on updating an older Google Maps setup for Bootstrap 3 tabs and modals.

item.title: Quick Tip: MySQL REPLACE
item.description: How to use MySQL’s REPLACE() function to change text in SELECT and UPDATE queries.

item.title: Raspberry Pi: List of Projects and Resources
item.description: Update in progress: This post collects resources, guides, and tips I found while putting together my Raspbmc media centre.

item.title: A look at Raspbmc video streaming
item.description: Outdated: A guide to video streaming on a Raspberry Pi using Raspbmc.

item.title: Quick Tip: MySQL CONCAT
item.description: A quick example of using MySQL’s CONCAT function to combine two columns into one value.

item.title: Quick tips: MySQL CASE
item.description: How to use MySQL’s CASE function to handle conditional output in a SQL statement.

item.title: Quick Tips: Firefox and Notepad++
item.description: A couple of small tips I found useful while working on websites.

item.title: PHP and UTF-8 encoding issues: Tips and tricks to resolve them
item.description: Character encoding can still be a pain, even when the right meta tag is in place. Here are a few tips that can help resolve common UTF-8 issues in PHP and MySQL.

item.title: iOS 7 Wishlist
item.description: A few things I would have liked to see in iOS 7.

item.title: WordPress Quick-tip: Display x number of posts outside your blog.
item.description: Sometimes, you may want to display posts outside of WordPress. Here are a few resources that helped.

item.title: Bootstrap and ASP.NET 4.0 master pages
item.description: Outdated: Working with Bootstrap in ASP.NET 4.0 master pages can be a little tricky out of the box, especially when script paths and validation scripts do not load as expected.

item.title: jQuery time picker issues and .NET
item.description: Using a jQuery time picker with .NET caused issues with a custom validator. Here is one way to fix it.

item.title: Japan Trip 2011: Planning and Tips
item.description: Update in progress: Useful phrases, transit advice, and budget tips from my 2011 Japan trip.
